name: Disgustingly Rich Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Melt the butter in a bowl.
3. Stir in the cocoa powder and sugar until well combined.
4. Add the melted butter mixture to the dry ingredients (flour, salt).
5. Mix in the eggs and vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
7. Grease an 8-inch or 9-inch baking pan with butter.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the brownies to cool completely before serving.
